name: Hungarian Potato and Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil (add about half a teaspoon of salt per cup of water).
2. Add the potatoes and cook until tender.
3. Drain the potatoes and let them cool slightly.
4. Cook the onion in oil until tender.
5. Mix the onion, oil, sour cream, salt, and pepper together.
6. Peel the potatoes and cut them into 1/4 inch slices.
7. Gently mix the potato slices with the sour cream mixture.
8. Arrange half of the potato slices in a greased baking dish (10x6x1-1/2 inches or a 1-1/2 quart casserole).
9. Place the boiled eggs on top of the potatoes.
10. Add the remaining potato slices to the dish.
11. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and paprika.
12. Bake, uncovered, at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 40 minutes.
13. Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
